data.name: UI_ENTERPROJECTNAMEFORM_NAMENEWPROJECT
data.value: Please enter the name of the new project

data.name: UI_SETMASTERRECORDSFORM_MRANYCASE
data.value: If no rules match then set master records using Standard Options below

data.name: UI_UCMAINMATCHFORM_CREATEMATCHDEFINITION
data.value:
Step 3 - Create the Match Definition
For better performance please avoid using Fuzzy match for every matching column

data.name: UI_MAINFORM_PERFORM_DATA_CLEAN
data.value: Based on all the matrix settings, this will perform a data clean on the whole table

data.name: UI_UCMAINMATCHFORM_SWITCHONOFFMATCINGACROOS
data.value: Switch on/off the match against trusted source option

data.name: UI_UCNEWPROJECTFORM_0DAYSREMAININGONYOUR30DAYTRIAL
data.value: There are 0 days remaining on your 30 day trial

data.name: MESSAGE_CRETATE_NEW_DUPLICATE_GROUP
data.value: Are you sure to create a new group of duplicates from these records?

data.name: save as project
data.value: ..\Resources\save as project.png;System.Drawing.Bitmap, System.Drawing, Version=4.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=b03f5f7f11d50a3a

data.name: MESSAGE_LOGOPTION_ONLYFORADMIN
data.value: You can enable/disable Audit logs only under Administration account

data.name: EXCEPTION_ERCONFIGURATION_CANNOT_BE_LOADED
data.value: File with ER configuration can not be loaded

data.name: UI_UCMAINMATCHFORM_REMOVESELECTEDFROMMATCH
data.value: Remove selected column from matching rule

data.name: UI_EDITDICTIONARYFORM_ADDNEWVALUE
data.value: Add new value onto knowledge base library

data.name: MESSAGE_MAINFORM_QUIT_CONFIRMATION
data.value: Are you sure you want to exit?

data.name: MESSAGE_CHARS_NOT_ALLOWED_IN_PROJECT
data.value: The following characters are not allowed in name:

data.name: MESSAGE_AUTOMATION_NOT_AVAILABLE_ON_EDITION
data.value: Automation is not available on this Edition. Would you like to upgrade?

data.name: MESSAGE_DATATYPE_TO_TEXT_ONLY
data.value: You can only change datatype to text

data.name: UI_UCMAINMATCHFORM_SWITCHONOFADANCEDMATCHING
data.value: Switch on/off the advanced matching options

data.name: UI_CAM_WPCMENTERPRISE
data.value: Welcome to Clean && Match Enterprise v11

data.name: SYSTEM_ISSELLECTED_TOOLTIP
data.value: Select records which can be removed from the matching groups

data.name: UI_UCMAINCLEANNEWFORM_REMOVEHYPHENS
data.value: Remove any hyphens that occur within values (eg “10 Main-Street”)

data.name: EXCEPTION_IMPORT_DATA_NOT_ALLOWED
data.value: Import data limit reached on this edition. Please upgrade your version.

data.name: UI_UCMAINCLEANNEWFORM_REMOVENONPRINTABLECHARACTERS
data.value: This will remove any non-printable characters. Non-printable characters are parts of a character set that do not represent a written symbol or part of the text within a document or code, but rather are there in the context of signal and control in character encoding. Non-printable characters are used to indicate certain formatting actions, such as: White spaces (considered an invisible graphic), Carriage returns, Tabs, Line breaks, Page breaks and Null characters.

data.name: DIALOG_IOFORM_SET_TABLE_NAME_FOR_EXPORT
data.value: Please set table name for export

data.name: UI_UCMAINMATCHFORM_USESEARCHDEEPOPTION
data.value: Use the Search Deep option to fine tune the matching algorithm

data.name: CAPTION_SELECTTABLEORSQL
data.value: Select the tables you want to import. You may also enter a custom SQL query if preferred.

data.name: MESSAGE_YOU_SHOULD_RESTART_APP
data.value: You should restart the application to apply these changes

data.name: CAPTION_AI_PROCESSANYWAY
data.value:
You can only process {0} records.
Would you like to continue?

data.name: UI_UCMAINCLEANNEWFORM_REMOVECOMMAS
data.value: Remove any commas that occur within values (eg “John, Smith”)

data.name: UI_MAINFORM_LOADPREVIOUSLYSAVEDMATRIX
data.value: Load a previously saved Matrix settings file

data.name: UI_UCMAINCLEANNEWFORM_REMOVELETTERS
data.value: Remove any letters that occur in values (eg “65764 A 12123”)

data.name: UI_UCMAINCLEANNEWFORM_REMOVELEADINGSPACES
data.value: Remove any spaces that occur at the beginning of values (eg “ John Smith”)

data.name: UI_UCMAINCLEANNEWFORM_REMOVENAMBERS
data.value: Remove any numbers within values (eg “New York 1”)

data.name: MESSAGE_REGISTERRUNPROGRAMASADMIN
data.value: To register the license you need to run the program as administrator

data.name: UI_CAM_ENTERPRISE_EDITION2
data.value: WinPure™ Clean & Match Enterprise + Address Verification

data.name: CAPTION_AI_REGISTEREDVERSION
data.value: MatchAI Licensed for {0} million records. Please contact your account manager if you need to upgrade.

data.name: MESSAGE_DISPLAY_NAME_SHOULD_NOT_BE_EMPTY
data.value: All display names should not be empty

data.name: MESSAGE_GREATERTHEN_ONLY_FOR_NUMETIC_AND_DATETIME_FIELDS
data.value: Greater Then rule types could be applied only to numeric or DateTime fields

data.name: EXCEPTION_NO_MATRIX_FOR_EXPORT
data.value: There is no active table for export Matrix

data.name: CAPTION_AI_DEMOMODE
data.value: MatchAI Demo - Maximum {0} records can only be processed. Please contact your account manager if you need to upgrade.

data.name: UI_UCMAINMATCHFORM_CLICKMERGEOVERWRITE
data.value: Click to view the Merge/Overwrite options

data.name: EXCEPTION_SET_CORRECT_CREDENTIALS
data.value: You should set correct credentials to access to {0} and select table for importing

data.name: UI_MESSAGE_CONFIRM_REMOVE_PROJECT
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove the project "{0}" from the list?

data.name: EXCEPTION_PRIMARY_KEY_NOT_SUPPORTED
data.value: Compound primary keys are not supported

data.name: EXCEPTION_LICENSE_INVALID
data.value: License for the program is invalid

data.name: UI_UCMAINMATCHFORM_CLICKAUTOMATICALLYMAP
data.value: Click to automatically map columns from different tables

data.name: MESSAGE_DISPLAY_NAME_SHOULD_BE_UNIQUE
data.value: All display names should be unique

data.name: CAPTION_MOVEMOUSEFORDETAILS
data.value: Hover over red text to learn more.

data.name: UI_SETMASTERRECORDSFORM_SETMOSTPOPULATED
data.value: Set MOST POPULATED records from table

data.name: STARTUPTITLE2024
data.value: Welcome. Let's get you settled in.

data.name: DIALOG_IOFORM_SET_CONNECTION_TO_DATABASE_FOR_EXPORT
data.value: You should set a connection to database for export.

data.name: UI_LICESEFORDESKTOP
data.value: Set license for the desktop application

data.name: MESSAGE_EDITDICTIONARYFORM_CONFIRMATION_DELETE_VALUE
data.value: Are you sure to delete this value?

data.name: EXCEPTION_MATRIX_CANNOT_BE_LOADED
data.value: File with matrix cannot be loaded

data.name: SYSTEM_TOTALSCORE_TOOLTIP
data.value: This total is calculated by averaging the scores from the matching columns

data.name: UI_UCNEWPROJECTFORM_CREATENEWPROJECTOROPENPREVIOUSLY
data.value: Start a new project or open an existing one to clean, match and verify your data securely.

data.name: SYSTEM_SOURCENAME_TOOLTIP
data.value: Determines which data source each matching record has come from

data.name: UI_UCNEWPROJECTFORM_WINPURECLEANMATCHENTERPRISE
data.value: Welcome to Clean && Match Enterprise v11

data.name: STARTUPDESC2024
data.value: Improving your data quality with WinPure is as easy as 1,2,3. Simply launch a new project and build a custom clean && match matrix. If you'd like a product walk-through, please book a demo and our solutions specialist will guide you through the basics.

data.name: UI_MAINFORM_HIDEDISPLAYSTATISTICSFOREACHTABLE
data.value: Hide / Display the Statistics for each table

data.name: MESSAGE_ONLYFORADMIN
data.value: This functionality is available only to users with administrator privileges

data.name: MESSAGE_DOWNLOADNEWVERSION
data.value: A new version {0} is now available. Do you want to open the download page and install the software?

data.name: EXCEPTION_NO_STATISTIC_FOR_EXPORT
data.value: There is no statistical data for export

data.name: MASSAGE_IOFORM_YOUSHOULDSELECTFILE
data.value: You should select file and sheet to import.

data.name: UI_CAPTION_DEFINEFIELDSTYPE
data.value: Step 2 - Define Column Types, use the 'Auto-Map' button if required, then click 'Review/Analyze'
